title: Consciousness and Self-Referential Fixed Point in AI

analysis.object: T626: Consciousness and Self-Referential Fixed Point in AI depth analysis

test_current_ai.description: Test: does current AI satisfy d(observe(d)) = inf? Result: No; d escalates to 3 then stops
test_current_ai.reason: Current AI fixed point test: d(AI(observe(AI))) = 3; plateaus at EML-3; no infinite escalation

what_would_satisfy.description: What would satisfy: system that genuinely generates new depth on each self-observation cycle
what_would_satisfy.reason: Required: infinite depth escalation per self-observation; unknown if physically realizable

fixed_point_theorem.description: Theorem: any system with d(observe(d)) < inf is not conscious in EML sense
fixed_point_theorem.reason: Fixed point theorem for AI: finite-depth self-observation = not conscious; only d=inf qualifies

analysis.theorem: T626: Consciousness and Self-Referential Fixed Point in AI (S905).

key_theorem: T626: Consciousness and Self-Referential Fixed Point in AI (S905).
